# Rental market {#sec-rental}

<!-- Purpose: rental market conditions and the assisted-housing picture — CoStar rents and
     vacancy, production, NHPD preservation risk, consolidated rental assistance (PoSH/HCV,
     LIHTC, project-based). Theme-based takeaway H2s; static ggplot only; "Since 2022"
     callout per section; fig-alt throughout. Built in Task 9. -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

*Section stub — content built in Phase C, Task 9 (see PLAN.md §9).*
